---
title: "API Reference"
description-meta: "Generated API reference documentation for all openme libraries: Go (pkg.go.dev), Swift DocC, Android KDoc, C# DocFX, C Doxygen."
---

openme provides generated API documentation for every official library.
Each reference is built automatically from source by the
[documentation workflow](https://github.com/merlos/openme/blob/main/.github/workflows/docs.yml)
and published alongside this site.

## Language References

| Library | Language | Reference |
|---------|----------|-----------|
| openme CLI & server | Go | [pkg.go.dev →](https://pkg.go.dev/github.com/merlos/openme/cli) |
| OpenMeKit | Swift | [DocC Reference →](/docs/api/swift/documentation/openmekit/) |
| OpenMeKit | Kotlin / Android | [KDoc Reference →](/docs/android-sdk/openmekit/) |
| OpenMeKit | C# / .NET | [DocFX Reference →](/docs/api/csharp/) |
| openmelib | C99 | [Doxygen Reference →](/docs/api/c/) |

## Go

The Go packages are documented with [godoc](https://pkg.go.dev) conventions
and published at **[pkg.go.dev/github.com/merlos/openme/cli](https://pkg.go.dev/github.com/merlos/openme/cli)**.

| Package | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| `pkg/protocol` | Wire format constants, packet sizes, error types |
| `internal/crypto` | Key generation, ECDH, encryption, signing |
| `internal/config` | Config structs, YAML loading/saving, port mode logic |
| `internal/server` | UDP listener, packet verification, replay cache |
| `internal/client` | Packet builder, knock sender, health check |
| `internal/firewall` | iptables and nftables backends, rule expiry manager |
| `internal/qr` | QR code generation for client provisioning |

## Swift

The Swift package uses [DocC](https://www.swift.org/documentation/docc/) with
triple-slash `///` doc comments.

→ [OpenMeKit Swift API Reference](/docs/api/swift/documentation/openmekit/)

## Kotlin / Android

The Android library uses [Dokka](https://kotlinlang.org/docs/dokka-introduction.html)
with KDoc `/** */` block comments.

→ [OpenMeKit Android KDoc Reference](/docs/android-sdk/openmekit/)

## C# / .NET

The .NET library uses [DocFX](https://dotnet.github.io/docfx/) with XML
`<summary>` doc comments.

→ [OpenMeKit .NET API Reference](/docs/api/csharp/)

## C (openmelib)

The C library uses [Doxygen](https://www.doxygen.nl/) `/** */` block comments
on all public symbols in `include/openmelib.h`.

→ [openmelib Doxygen Reference](/docs/api/c/)

## Documentation Standards

All exported symbols in every library follow the documentation conventions
defined in the [copilot instructions](https://github.com/merlos/openme/blob/main/.github/copilot-instructions.md)
— intent, parameters, return values, example, and a link to the relevant
protocol specification page.
